emailText:
Hi there,

I came across the The g Hotel website and wanted to share some honest observations based on a quick audit. No pitch - just a fresh pair of eyes.

========================================
Website Health Check - Score: 76/100
========================================

5 issues identified:

HIGH
--------------------
- 4 HTTP resources
 MEDIUM
--------------------
- 18 external scripts
 MEDIUM
--------------------
- No local business schema
 MEDIUM
--------------------
- Missing contact form
 HIGH
--------------------
- 2 broken gallery links


WHAT'S WORKING WELL
--------------------
+ Business is established and operational
+ Has independent web presence
+ Active in local market

========================================

Your current website provider should be flagging things like this for you.

If you ever need a fresh pair of eyes or a new provider, just reach out.

Best,
David
DS Studios

issues.label: 4 HTTP resources

issues.detail: Visitors can't fill out an inquiry form directly on your site.
issues.label: Missing contact form
issues.check: Does the Contact page have form fields (Name, Email, Message)?
issues.siteHint: Inline contact forms convert 3x better than email-only links.

issues.label: 2 broken gallery links
issues.siteHint: This issue may affect user experience or rankings.
